nasb.text: To Absalom there were born three sons, and one daughter whose name was Tamar; she was a woman of beautiful appearance.

esv.text: There were born to Absalom three sons, and one daughter whose name was Tamar. She was a beautiful woman.

cnv.text: 押沙龍生了三個兒子，一個女兒。女兒名叫他瑪，是個容貌美麗的女子。

ccb.text: 押沙龙有三儿一女，女儿名叫她玛，长得非常美丽。
